---
title: "Ann Parnell"
---

## Ann Parnell

**Dates:** (b. Cornwall 1828/9)

### Description

nurse to CMY\'s nephews and nieces

### Biography

She is found at Otterbourne House in the censuses of 1861 and 1871.

### Letters

- Letter from May 8 th [1876]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
